mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stores (roastery_id, owner_id, name, description, address, latitude, longitude, phone_number, category, thumbnail_url, open_time, close_time, average_rating, review_count, rating_count, rating_sum, visit_count, is_closed, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{store.roasteryId}, #{store.ownerId}, #{store.name}, #{store.description}, #{store.address}, #{store.latitude}, #{store.longitude}, #{store.phoneNumber}, #{store.category}, #{store.thumbnailUrl}, #{store.openTime}, #{store.closeTime}, #{store.averageRating}, #{store.reviewCount}, #{store.ratingCount}, #{store.ratingSum}, #{store.visitCount}, #{store.isClosed}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE stores SET name = #{store.name}, description = #{store.description}, address = #{store.address}, latitude = #{store.latitude}, longitude = #{store.longitude}, phone_number = #{store.phoneNumber}, category = #{store.category}, thumbnail_url = #{store.thumbnailUrl}, open_time = #{store.openTime}, close_time = #{store.closeTime}, is_closed = #{store.isClosed}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{store.id}
UPDATE stores SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{storeId}

UPDATE stores SET average_rating = CASE WHEN GREATEST(rating_count + #{ratingCountDelta}, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND( GREATEST(rating_sum + #{ratingSumDelta}, 0) / GREATEST(rating_count + #{ratingCountDelta}, 0), 2 ) ELSE 0 END, review_count = GREATEST(review_count + #{reviewCountDelta}, 0), rating_count = GREATEST(rating_count + #{ratingCountDelta}, 0), rating_sum = GREATEST(rating_sum + #{ratingSumDelta}, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{storeId}
UPDATE stores SET visit_count = visit_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{storeId}
